steps.title: Multiply 13 by each term
steps.content:
Using the distributive property, multiply 13 by each term in the parentheses:

$$13 \cdot x^2 = 13x^2$$
$$13 \cdot (-7) = -91$$

steps.title: Combine and match the answer
steps.content:
Combine the results:

$$13x^2 - 91$$

That matches choice A — A is correct.
